problems.name: Critical-path span attribution
problems.risk: Root latency is not actionable unless the dominant child span is identified.

problems.name: Tail-sampling evidence coverage
problems.risk: Incident traces can be sampled away even when aggregate metrics show a problem.

problems.name: Autoscaler lag and cold-start recovery
problems.risk: A capacity plan can look adequate while scale-up latency still misses the incident window.

problems.name: Tenant blast-radius detection
problems.risk: A premium tenant can be impacted while aggregate service health looks only moderately degraded.

problems.name: Token and GPU cost guardrail
problems.risk: Long prompts and expensive model variants can create reliability and cost regressions together.
